interests.name: Cricket & Football
interests.description: Sports analytics is my second language. Whether it is staying up late for a Test match or analyzing Premier League tactical formations, I enjoy combining my love for data with the unpredictability of sports.

interests.name: Sci-Fi & Speculative Fiction
interests.description: I find deep inspiration in speculative futures. Authors like Ted Chiang, Cixin Liu, and Isaac Asimov push me to think about the long-term ethical implications of the AI systems we are building today.

interests.name: Coffee Rituals
interests.description: Precision brewing fuels my coding sessions. I treat my espresso pulls and pour-overs with mathematical accuracy—weighing beans to the tenth of a gram, calculating ratios, and timing extractions.

interests.name: Acoustic Guitar
interests.description: When the screens get too bright and compiling takes too long, I unplug and play fingerstyle arrangements of classic rock, folk, and ambient tunes to reset my creative energy.

interests.name: Creative Role-Play Designing
interests.description: Designing interactive scenarios and worldbuilding narrative threads to explore choices and outcomes.

interests.name: Web Browsing & Exploring Tech
interests.description: Always scanning the web, documentation pages, and GitHub repositories for new tools, frameworks, and AI advancements.
